case_title: ORO SPANISH BROADCASTING, INC. RADIO STATION KIQI VS REYNOSO, RAMON DR. D.C.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, RAMON  DR.  D.C.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,037.14 FILED BY ORO SPANISH BROADCASTING, INC. RADIO STATION KIQI AS TO DEFENDANT REYNOSO, RAMON  DR.  D.C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORO SPANISH BROADCASTING, INC. RADIO STATION KIQI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REYNOSO, RAMON  DR.  D.C. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-10-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
LETTER REC'D FROM DEFT RE: CHALLENGE OF VENUE IN IN DEC. '94.
